title: Opus vs Sonnet vs Haiku：何时选用哪个模型
title_en: Opus vs Sonnet vs Haiku: When to Use Each

body.itemA: Claude Opus 4.6 — 最强智能，适合构建 agent 和复杂编码任务
body.itemB: Claude Sonnet 4.6 / Haiku 4.5 — 在速度和智能之间做不同取舍

dimensions.name: 定位
dimensions.a: Opus：最高智能，复杂推理和 agent 场景
dimensions.b: Sonnet：速度与智能的最佳平衡；Haiku：最快速度，接近前沿智能

dimensions.name: 典型用途
dimensions.a: 多步骤 agent 工作流、高难度代码生成、需要深度推理的任务
dimensions.b: Sonnet：日常开发辅助、RAG 管道；Haiku：实时聊天、分类、高吞吐批处理

dimensions.name: 选择原则
dimensions.a: 质量优先，不在乎延迟和成本时选 Opus
dimensions.b: 在延迟或成本有约束时，先试 Sonnet；若仍不够快/便宜，降到 Haiku

body_en.itemA: Claude Opus 4.6 — highest intelligence, built for agents and complex coding
body_en.itemB: Claude Sonnet 4.6 / Haiku 4.5 — different speed-intelligence trade-offs

dimensions.name: Positioning
dimensions.a: Opus: peak intelligence for complex reasoning and agentic workflows
dimensions.b: Sonnet: best speed-intelligence balance; Haiku: fastest with near-frontier intelligence

dimensions.name: Typical use
dimensions.a: Multi-step agent workflows, hard coding tasks, deep reasoning
dimensions.b: Sonnet: daily dev assistance, RAG pipelines; Haiku: real-time chat, classification, high-throughput batch

dimensions.name: Selection rule
dimensions.a: Choose Opus when quality matters most and latency/cost are secondary
dimensions.b: Try Sonnet first when latency or cost is constrained; drop to Haiku if still too slow/expensive
